top_signals.title: Oil Creeps Higher as Fresh Ship Attacks Underscore Hormuz Risks
top_signals.summary: Oil nudged higher following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Commission presents EU Action Plan on Cybersecurity and Artificial Intelligence
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Strasbourg, 07 Jul 2026 The European Commission has presented an Action Plan for a structured response to address the risks and harness the opportunities of advanced artificial intelligence (AI) models for cybersecurity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: IGI to Release Second Quarter and Half Year 2026 Financial Results on August 4, 2026
top_signals.summary: International General Insurance Holdings Ltd. (“IGI” or the “Company”) (NASDAQ: IGIC) today announced that it expects to release financial results for the second quarter and first half of 2026 on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, after the close of the U.S. financial markets. The results, along with an accompanying slide presentation, will be posted in the [...]
